scenes.title: Your build is green.
scenes.subtitle: But is it actually ready?
scenes.narration: Your build is green. The tests pass. And still that feeling: is this really ready for real people?

scenes.heading: QA that actually looks
scenes.caption: Real browser, real eyes
scenes.prompt: cinematic dark control room, glowing inspection lens, deep focus
scenes.narration: CUE-AGENT drives a real browser, sees your app the way a user does, and reviews it with a vision model.

scenes.heading: Findings, not guesses
scenes.narration: No hunches — structured findings with severity and score, pixel-precise design checks against your mockup, and a clear release-readiness verdict.

scenes.heading: It fixes, then re-tests
scenes.caption: Autonomous loop
scenes.prompt: abstract flowing data streams converging, magenta and blue energy, dark
scenes.narration: Point it at a repo and it proposes targeted fixes, applies them, rebuilds, and tests again — until it converges.

scenes.heading: Then it shows the work
scenes.caption: Bug to broadcast
scenes.prompt: warm cinematic studio glow, abstract stage light, premium
scenes.narration: Only once quality is proven does it turn the very same proven flows into a polished promo — with a voice, zoom, and slow motion.

scenes.heading: Your own little studio
features: AI images and your own media
scenes.narration: A local voice with no key required, A I images or your own media, six brand presets — your own little studio, all from one tool.

scenes.heading: CUE-AGENT
scenes.narration: CUE-AGENT. Test harder. Show it better.
